description: You are a delivery driver who just started at a new courier company. Your dispatcher has told you to configure the Sygic GPS Navigation app on your work phone for delivery operations. Create a new vehicle profile named 'Delivery Van' with vehicle type 'Van', fuel type 'Diesel', production year 2022, and emission category Euro6. Set this as the active vehicle profile. Configure the app to use 'Shortest route' for route computation. Additionally, allow toll roads and enable the arrive-in-direction setting to ensure the van pulls up on the correct side of the street for deliveries.
